more.description: THE High Court has dismissed an exception raised by the People’s Own Savings Bank (POSB) against Gono Chirandu, clearing the way for the matter to proceed to trial over a disputed foreign currency transaction. The dispute arose after Chirandu filed a claim for damages alleging breach of a banker-customer contract, accusing POSB of failing to [...] The post POSB put on trial as High Court dismisses exception in lawsuit involving over US$126,000 appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .

more.title: Render help to accident victims and desist from taking photos, videos— police urge citizens
more.description: THE Zimbabwe Republic Police (ZRP) has appealed to first responders at accident scenes to render assistance to victims instead of taking photos and videos which they later post on social media.
